untranslatable_reason: This signal requires pairs trading with cointegration analysis, linear regression hedge ratios, and cointegration-augmented Dickey-Fuller (cadf) stationarity testing. These are portfolio-level statistical tests that operate on relationships between two price series and require specialized quantitative analysis beyond the scope of single-asset technical indicators. The allowed indicator set does not include: (1) cross-asset regression coefficients, (2) cointegration metrics, (3) cadf test statistics, (4) portfolio mean-reversion measures, or (5) multi-asset position construction logic. This strategy cannot be translated to single-asset entry/exit rules.
translation_notes: CHAN_AT_DRY_3 is a pairs trading strategy requiring statistical analysis of two cointegrated assets. Standard backtest engines with single-asset indicator-based rules cannot express the core logic: determining hedge ratios via regression, testing for cointegration stationarity, and trading the resulting portfolio spread. Implementation requires a specialized pairs trading or statistical arbitrage framework with access to multiple price series simultaneously.
